voice_observations.caption_text:
Step inside the world of Blu Scarpa with founder @matthewchevallard . From the inspiration behind the brand to his favorite pieces, he shares the creativity and craftsmanship that define the Blu Scarpa story.

Shop the collection in-store and online on levelshoes.com
notable_phrases: Step inside the world of Blu Scarpa with founder . From the inspiration behind the brand to his favorite pieces, he shares the creativity and craftsmanship that define the Blu Scarpa story
Shop the collection in-store and online on levelshoes.com
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi, my name is Matthew Chevalard. I'm the creative director and president of Blu Scarpa. We're a Miami-based brand, an American design, but all handmade in Italy. The story of the name behind the brand is Blu Scarpa means blue shoe in Italian. I found there not to be enough blue options, so I started a brand all around blue and shoes. We're definitely highly inspired by contemporary art. I would say also sports. I was born in the 80s, so I like to say it's homage to the golden age of tennis. It's not limited to tennis, but tennis is really one of the central themes. The uniform is simply a sneaker and a loafer. Our update to the penny loafer, which we call the Monante College, is one of my favorites. It is the adobe suede with the turquoise coin. This shoe is always one of my favorite shoes. I think it's just simple, but unique, and really epitomizes Blu Scarpa. Then I really love the exclusive we did for Level Shoes. This latinis has light blue eyelets and an embroidered signature circle. This shoe has a play on textures and fabrics. It goes from suede to canvas to embroidery hit. We don't sell this model, so I'm a little jealous I actually don't have this pair. It's really, really cool. I'm wearing Laraner. This is the first sneaker we did. It has the turquoise cabochon stone hit, which is our signature as well. Turquoise is a central theme in Blu Scarpa. This is a really everyday option that I think represents Blu Scarpa to the fullest. Thanks for having me. Had a great time. See you soon. Bye, guys.
voice_observations.hook_text: Step inside the world of Blu Scarpa with founder @matthewchevallard.
